name: Kong API Gateway MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Kong — the leading open-source API gateway and API management platform. Enables AI agents to manage Kong services, routes, plugins, consumers, and API policies. Agents can configure rate limiting, authentication, load balancing, and traffic management across Kong-managed APIs.
use_cases: Managing Kong services and routes from API infrastructure automation agents
Configuring Kong plugins (rate limiting, auth, logging) from API governance agents
Querying Kong API metrics and traffic data from API observability agents
Managing API consumers and credentials from API security agents
not_for: Simple proxy needs (Kong is powerful but complex — nginx may suffice)
Real-time traffic manipulation at sub-millisecond latency
best_when: An organization using Kong as their API gateway wants AI agents to automate API management — configuring routes, managing plugins, and monitoring API health across microservices.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Kong manages production API traffic — configuration changes affect all downstream services. Changes require careful testing and human approval.

auth.notes: Kong Admin API key authentication. Kong Enterprise adds RBAC. Kong Konnect (cloud) uses personal access tokens.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Kong Gateway Open Source is free; Enterprise adds advanced features
pricing.notes: Kong Gateway is open source and free to self-host. Konnect cloud and Enterprise add management UI, advanced plugins, and support.

performance.rate_limits: Kong Admin API rate limits depend on deployment configuration

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Kong manages production API traffic — config changes affect all services
Kong Admin API should NEVER be exposed to the internet — requires internal network access
Plugin configuration errors can break all API traffic — require staging validation
Kong Konnect (cloud) vs self-hosted have different auth models
Community MCP — verify against your Kong version (major version changes break compatibility)
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Production API gateway. Admin API must be internal-only. Kong manages authentication for all proxied APIs. Configuration changes require staging testing.

security_score_components.security_notes: API gateway managing production traffic. Admin API must be internal-only. RBAC on Enterprise. Configuration changes affect all proxied services.
